text.title: Stripe Payment Links No Backend Example
text.summary: One worked example: a $29 lifetime-deal indie product with email + Sheets fulfillment.

example.code: catalog: - sku: ltd-29 price_cents: 2900 currency: usd name: "Lifetime Deal Bundle" fulfill_action: email-license-key fulfillment_channels: - {channel: email, address: downloads@faion.net} - {channel: sheet, address: "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/.../edit"} webhook_events_needed: - checkout.session.completed - charge.refunded idempotency_store: "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/.../edit#gid=0"

example.note: Decision-tree walk: billing_model=one-off, custom_amount_per_buyer=false, connect_required=false → leaf r-payment-link.
Bad example: same product priced "name your price" — Payment Link reused with manual URL edits between buyers.
Decision tree says custom_amount_per_buyer=true → r-checkout-session. Operator who insists on payment-link mode trips the validator and the spec is rejected.
